info.topictitle: What Paper 2 (Reading) Is 阅读理解概述

markdown:
## What Paper 2 (Reading) Is 阅读理解概述




<callout type="note">Waiting for definition from IB for following terms:</callout>

1. Authentic 
2. Receptive 
3. Comprehend
4. Paper 2 is a **receptive *** *assessment for the four **Receptive** skills.
5. **Receptive** skills are also referred to as **Listening** and **Reading** skills. This involved **comprehending **a spoken text in the **target language **and **interpret**ing the entire meaning of the listening text.
6. Students will be presented with authentic texts and respond to a variety of questions at different levels, demonstrating their understanding.
7. It consists of four **sections** of increasing level of difficulty.
8. Authentic texts are texts that are written for a general audience whose first, second or third language is in Chinese.
9. Students are expected to understand the questions (which are presented in English and Chinese) and answer in the language specified by the instructions (English or Chinese)
10. This paper **contains **_four _receptive listening tasks, with the section A containing the most basic tasks, and increasing in difficulty within Section D.
11. The three main types of genres students may expect to encounter in the unseen texts may include: 
12. Articles (from popular sources such as 南方周末)
13. Menus
14. Instructions (970点 **新闻**提示)
15. Posters (广告)
16. Catalogs (节目单)
17. Blog Entries (麦子的博客)
18. Letters (来自 **王小光**的来信)
19. Fliers
20. Announcements (在学校的通知)
21. Pamphlets (小册子)
22. Directions (指南)
23. The **key **to answering questions in this Paper is to understand the main messages the author is attempting to convey.
24. The**_ central **_idea can be usually detected in the **introductory **text at the start of a paragraph, or at the end of a **_body_** paragraph near the _**conclusion **._
25. Try to extend your understanding through this **_IB Chinese_** _**Paper **_by making connections to other _**spoken_ **_discussions_** or **_debates_** you have had in class about relevant themes or topics. 
26. Additionally, recall any **_vocabulary_** you have learnt that would be reliable and consistently demonstrated throughout each paragraph.
27. The best technique for time management upon this _**Paper **_is to _**allocate **_a specified time to each section and if you are stuck, move on. This allows your _**brain **_to _**recall **_vocabulary _**relating _to a section as you answer the following section.
28. Return to any incomplete sections once you have completed the Papers to **maximize **your final _**mark **_(ensure every answer is complete).
29. While answering, try to _**relate ** _specific information you read in a paragraph ( _**detailed ** _information _) to the overall _**central ** _theme the author expresses ( _**overall * _theme_)? 
30. This allows candidates to _**demonstrate **_an **_advanced_** **level **_of comprehension.
